findings.recommended_fix: Create a sales deck to effectively communicate the value proposition of VOLAURA
Research and establish clear pricing for the AZ market to facilitate sales
Identify the first 10 target organizations for VOLAURA and develop a strategy to approach them
Develop a list of potential objections from Nigar and prepare responses to address them

findings.issue: Onboarding process for non-technical org admin
findings.recommended_fix: Simplify the onboarding process to make it accessible for non-technical organization administrators

first_customer_playbook: 1. Develop a sales deck, 2. Establish clear pricing for the AZ market, 3. Identify the first 10 target organizations, 4. Anticipate and address potential objections, 5. Simplify the onboarding process
